name: Noble NB4 Update Tool
description: Firmware update tool for the FlySky Noble NB4 transmitter (connect the NB4 by USB in update mode).
notes: Bare portable exe (self-contained firmware updater) - no installer, run directly. STD/global build; an FCC (US) variant also exists. USB flashing may trigger an antivirus warning (vendor says this is expected). The download URL redirects to a Squarespace static host whose token changes if FlySky re-uploads.
